description: Raise min_confluence_score from 2 to 3. SHAP shows confluence_score at 0.071 importance â€” moderate but non-trivial. More critically, it interacts with the time features: the low-confluence trades that squeak through at score=2 are disproportionately the off-peak, low-quality entries. The current scoring (0â€“8 scale, max: 2+2+1+1+1+1) means score=2 only requires SS alignment OR ISS alignment with nothing else â€” that's a one-leg signal with no confirmation. Score=3 forces at least one additional confluence factor (CBC, 50% tap, target proximity, or no F2 conflict). Since signal_tier has near-zero SHAP (0.011), the tier system isn't adding much, but the raw confluence threshold is a meaningful gate.
expected_improvement: Expect to filter out ~20-30% of the weakest trades (those with only single-leg alignment and no confirming factors). Win rate should improve by +2-3pp at the cost of fewer signals. Net profit factor improvement of ~0.1-0.2. Lower confidence because the SHAP importance for confluence is moderate â€” the hour filter is doing most of the heavy lifting.
